headlines.title: Trump threatens attacks on Iran's power plants over opening Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: President Trump threatens to 'obliterate' Iranian power plants if Tehran fails to open the Strait of Hormuz, escalating tensions in the Middle East.

headlines.title: Iran threatens to retaliate against Gulf energy and water systems
headlines.summary: Iran said it would strike the energy and water systems of its Gulf neighbours in retaliation if U.S. attacks occur.

headlines.title: Iranian missile strikes near Israeli nuclear facility
headlines.summary: Iranian missile strikes hit near an Israeli nuclear facility, with 75 people receiving treatment including ten severely injured.

headlines.title: Paris and Marseille in focus as French vote in local election runoffs
headlines.summary: French voters went to the polls to elect mayors in Paris, Marseille and more than 1,500 other cities and towns, testing the far right's strength.

headlines.title: Slovenians vote in tight race between liberals and populist right
headlines.summary: Polls opened in Slovenia's election pitting incumbent liberal Prime Minister Robert Golob against right-wing populist Janez Jansa.

headlines.title: Russia Launches First Rocket From Repaired Baikonur Launch Pad
headlines.summary: Russia launched a Soyuz rocket from a repaired launch pad at its Baikonur cosmodrome in Kazakhstan, restoring capability to fly to the International Space Station.

headlines.title: Vietnam's Communist Party secures nearly 97% of assembly seats
headlines.summary: Vietnam's Communist Party won nearly 97% of the 500 seats in the National Assembly according to results released by the parliament.

headlines.title: Cuba's power grid collapsed
headlines.summary: Cuba's power grid collapsed Saturday leaving the country without electricity for a third time in March as the communist government battles with a decaying infrastructure.

headlines.title: Robert Mueller, former FBI director who led Russia investigation, dies at 81
headlines.summary: Robert Mueller, the former FBI chief who documented Russia's interference in the 2016 U.S. election, has died at age 81.

headlines.title: U.S. deploys additional 2,200 Marines to the Middle East
headlines.summary: The U.S. deploys an additional 2,200 Marines to the Middle East as the Trump administration weighs options amid escalating Iran tensions.
